rulings.Case Title: 1068 FLORIDA LLC VS. SEOSAMH O'BRIAIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 16, 2021 line 3. DEFENDANT SEOSAMH O'BRIAIN, ACE DRILLING & EXCAVATION, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint is DENIED. Moving party failed to carry its burden for belated filing of the cross-complaint. The Court does not rule on the issue of necessary party at this time and such issue may be raised by an appropriate motion. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND VINCENT DIGIACOMO JR. VS. TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE Amended ANSWER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 16, 2021 line 1. PLAINTIFF RAYMOND DIGIACOMO MOTION TO STRIKE Amended ANSWER to Amended COMPLAINT is GRANTED for Defendant to assert affirmative defenses with indication as to which cause(s) of action they are applicable, include only relevant matter, and state sufficient facts as to each element. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: OPEN TOP SIGHTSEEING SAN FRANCISCO, LLC ET AL VS. DONS HOTEL OWNER LP ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 16, 2021 line 3. DEFENDANT DONS HOTEL OWNER LP DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a cognizable cause of action for any relief sought in light of the governing authorities. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
